post.description: Authenticate a user and return a JWT token
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token and refresh token

get.description: Get the authenticated user permissions in a workspace
List folders. Optionally filter by parentId or workspaceId.
List items. Optionally filter by parentId or workspaceId.

post.description: Create a document item by uploading a file via multipart/form-data

get.description: Get all workspaces for the authenticated user
Get a workspace by ID for the authenticated user

post.description: Delete a workspace. Only the owner can perform this, and must confirm with their password.

get.description: Resolve a folder path (list of ids separated by /) into the ordered chain of folder names. Validates that every id belongs to the workspace and that each folder is a child of the previous.

post.description: Archive an item, hiding it from the default view

get.description: List all members of a workspace with their user and role

patch.description: Assign or change a workspace member's role

delete.description: Remove a member from a workspace

post.description: Invite a user to a workspace by email

get.description: List pending invites of a workspace

post.description: Issue a short-lived ticket used to authenticate a WebSocket connection

get.description: List all roles for a workspace

post.description: Create a new role in a workspace

delete.description: Delete a role from a workspace

get.description: List all permissions for a role

put.description: Replace all permissions for a role
